---
title: "Personal Projects"
---

This page is dedicated to projects I have undertaken outside of my formal studies.


::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
## Ocean Power Technologies: A Thorough Analysis

In this project, I analyse the stock ticker OPTT (Ocean Power Technologies). It is a stock that has 
long suffered after immediate and rapid success, now residing as a penny stock trading for less than $0.50.

Recently, they signed a $6.5 million deal with the US government, giving the company a chance to pivot their
business model into something (potentially) profitable. 

In this analysis, I use an OLS Regression to analyse the stock's historical performance and a logistic regression 
dive into their historical risk. Moreover, I use Random Forest, XGBoost, and LSTM Network algorithms to predict 
future performance. My main goal is to better understand how to analyse stocks using statistical modelling, while 
also looking into the limitations of single-algorithm machine learning techniques when predicting stock performance. 

My thesis is that XGBoost will perform best at predicting daily or weekly future metrics due to it's ability to handle 
non-linear data well. That being said, I believe the LSTM network will perform best when predicting longer term overall
trends due to it's strengths in pattern recognition over time. 

This project is currently still underway, but feel free to check out my progress on my github repo!
Once finished, I will also upload a rendered PDF output of my full report with visualisations and analysis. 

**Want to dive into my work? My progress is live on GitHub:**

[View Progress](https://github.com/ojreece/Machine-Learning-Predictive-Modelling){.btn .btn-outline-primary}

:::
